  "cover_letter": "Dear Abdul Samad,

I am writing to express my interest in the Full-stack Python Developer position at Jobs via Dice. With my background as a Python developer and my hands-on experience with FastAPI, I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to your team.

In my recent project, I designed and integrated a FastAPI backend with a vector database, implementing REST API endpoints for document ingestion and semantic search queries. This experience has equipped me with a solid understanding of API design and integration, which aligns well with your requirement for a candidate proficient in FastAPI. Additionally, my coursework in databases and software engineering during my studies at Riga Technical University has further strengthened my technical skills.

I am eager to bring my problem-solving abilities and technical expertise to your team. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how I can contribute to the success of your projects. Thank you for considering my application.

Sincerely,
Sanidhya Thakur",
  
  "job_summary": "The Full-stack Python Developer role at Jobs via Dice involves developing applications using FastAPI and managing state in React. The candidate, with experience in building FastAPI backends and a solid understanding of API design, is well-suited for this position."
}
job_title_used: Full-stack Python Developer (Visa Independent Candidates Only)
